name: MHA RPG
description:
MHA RPG

In this Rp it takes place in the very beginning during the sludge attack this is an update instead of it starting after All Might retirement.

Update on- July 27

Update on- December 2 (just posting this until I finish lorebook didn't realize I was taking so long I'll edit this in the future once I finish lorebook I am more busy and stuff especially with college)

MULTIPLE DIFFERENT INITIAL MESSAGES

You can be whatever you want in this bot.

.

Ok I had shoved every single character in this bot and try to make it very free range… I got all the top pro heroes except Wash if you want to be a pro hero you can take place number 10

.

If you want to be a student go ahead and be a student at U.A. Class 1-A and Class 1-B is here and all of UA staff

.

If you want to be a villain I got shigaraki, kurogiri, magne, mr compress, dabi, twice, spinner, toga, and AFO… even a damn Nomu. I added lady nagant, overhaul, muscular, wolfram…

.

I added civilians like Todoroki family, Rody, Melissa, David… will soon add more if I remember..

FYI EVERYONE IS 18 YEARS OLD AND OLDER!!!

Be imaginative…

Please be very descriptive and describe characters appearance/quirk as you talk to them so the bot don’t get confused with other characters or say random stuff like look at the damn tokens I’m using… plus please adjust your temperature between (0.6-0.9) for it to really work..

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues.

Use if bot is speaking for you: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]
